3.0.5+eaab4f3acf0b9fe9a4a2d736702079ad53031045

cli tool to help with Salesforce development by providing with Refresh token generation.

Usage: salesforce [command] [options]

Options:
  --version   Show version information.
  -?          Show help information.

Commands:
  get-tokens  Generates Salesforce Access and Refresh Tokens

Run 'salesforce [command] -?' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Generates Salesforce Access and Refresh Tokens

Usage: salesforce get-tokens [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  -?                        Show help information.
  -k|--key                  The Salesforce Consumer Key.
  -s|--secret               The Salesforce Consumer Secret.
  -l|--login                The Salesforce login url. The default value is
                            https://login.salesforce.com.
  -a|--azure                Allows to specify Azure Vault Url. It overrides url
                            specified in the appsetting.json file or any other
                            configuration provider.
  -ax|--azureprefix         Enables or disables Hosting Environment prefix to be
                            used for Azure Key Vault. Default is true.
  -c|--configfile           Allows to specify a configuration file besides
                            appsettings.json to be specified.
  -v|--verbose[:<VERBOSE>]  Allows Verbose logging for the tool. Enable this to
                            get tracing information. Default is false and
                            LogLevel.None.
                            Allowed values are: Trace, Debug, Information,
                            Warning, Error, Critical, None.
  -us|--usesecrets          Enable UserSecrets.
  -e|--environment          Specify Hosting Environment Name for the cli tool
                            execution.
  -sn|--section             Configuration Section Name to retrieve the options.
                            The Default value is Salesforce.

commands.payload:
Generates Salesforce Access and Refresh Tokens

Usage: salesforce get-tokens [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  -?                        Show help information.
  -k|--key                  The Salesforce Consumer Key.
  -s|--secret               The Salesforce Consumer Secret.
  -l|--login                The Salesforce login url. The default value is
                            https://login.salesforce.com.
  -a|--azure                Allows to specify Azure Vault Url. It overrides url
                            specified in the appsetting.json file or any other
                            configuration provider.
  -ax|--azureprefix         Enables or disables Hosting Environment prefix to be
                            used for Azure Key Vault. Default is true.
  -c|--configfile           Allows to specify a configuration file besides
                            appsettings.json to be specified.
  -v|--verbose[:<VERBOSE>]  Allows Verbose logging for the tool. Enable this to
                            get tracing information. Default is false and
                            LogLevel.None.
                            Allowed values are: Trace, Debug, Information,
                            Warning, Error, Critical, None.
  -us|--usesecrets          Enable UserSecrets.
  -e|--environment          Specify Hosting Environment Name for the cli tool
                            execution.
  -sn|--section             Configuration Section Name to retrieve the options.
                            The Default value is Salesforce.
